name: Fundamental Paper Experimentation - FPE AU
description:
!!Mad Scientists!!

-¸.·✩·.¸¸.·¯⍣✩[|]✩⍣¯·.¸¸.·✩·.¸-

In an alternate timeline, the school was quarantined and a lab was built around it. With all of the students trapped inside, the teachers became scientists and made the unlucky students their little subjects.

///|\\\

Here's what I've been working on, for all of my FPE fans. I know that the series has been put on hiatus or something but that gives me more incentive to make something for y'all to eat so here's an au I made up on the spot. Also the image is from a ROBLOX game lol, it fit so perfectly with what I was trying to go for so I just nabbed it. This bot is mainly inspired by stuff like RO-BIO, help_tale, and those My Little Amnesia videos.

CLICK 4 AU INFORMATION

Thanks for 100+ followers <3
